sections.sectionTitle: Seir Mualtung Gam Siatna Ding Genkholhna

verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Seir Mual lam nga in la, Edom mite mawhsakna thu gen in
Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, hih bangin gen in: “Seir Mualtung gam aw, kei, nangma lang ka hi hi. Nang a gamkhingin ka hong bawl ding hi
Na khuapite ka siasak ding a, na gamsungteng gamkhing ka suaksak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding hi
“Nang pen Israel mite' gal na hi tawntung a, a mawhna hangun gim a tuah ni a nunung pen, a lungkham thuak hun laitakun Israel mite na siasakmang hi
Tua ahih ciangin kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, nangma sihna ding ka bawl ding a, na si takpi ding hi. Nangmah in mi sisak na hih manin nangma tungah sihna hong tung ding hi
Seir Mualtung gam khempeuh gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, tua gamsunga a vak mi khempeuh ka that ding hi
Mualtung khempeuh si luanghawm tawh ka kidimsak ding a, mual leh guam khempeuh dimin galsunga a site' luanghawm a om ding hi
A gamkhingin kong bawl paisuak ding a, na khuapite sungah kuamah tengkik nawnlo ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi
“Kei pen Israel leh Judah mite' Topa Pasian hinapi-in, hih minam nihte nangma-a'-in ngaihsunin a luah dingin na kigen hi

Tua ahih manin kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, hih ka minam nihte tungah na heh gamtatna, na muhdah bawlna, leh na hazat bawlna tawh kizui-in nangma tungah kong thukkik ding hi. Amaute tungah na gamtatnasa hangin gim hong pia ka hihna thu amaute in thei ding uh hi
Tua ciangin nangmah in, ‘Israel mualtungte gamkhing suak ta a, keima-a' ding hita hi,’ ci-in simmawhna tawh na kampaunate, Topa ahi keimah in a za ka hihlam na thei ding hi
Kei hong gensia-in na kiphatsak paunate khempeuh a vekin ka za khin hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Leitung buppi a lungdam theihna dingin nang a gamkhingpha mahmahin kong bawl ding a

keima mi Israel-te a siatgawp manin na lungdamna zah tawh kizui-in nangma tungah kong bawl ding hi. Seir Mualtung gam ahi Edom leitang khempeuh, gamkhing suak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi.
